whatsNew: The unreliable Open phone Downloads action has been replaced with a working Open online portfolio button using the learner’s saved website link.
The download confirmation now gives clear step-by-step instructions for finding the ZIP and uploading it to Aptem or another online portfolio.
If no valid portfolio link has been saved, the popup takes the learner directly to the portfolio-link field in Settings.
The popup explains how to extract and upload the included PDFs when a portfolio does not accept ZIP files.
